For right team, Aurita or Ramona could be good. Aurita helps dish out damage while not using much energy so that you can spam Sanga and Caecus cards more. Ramona can recycle the big cost cards during crucial turns, give big temporary strength for Caecus (Shattering halberd) or with tentacle generation from Sanga (4 cost card).
Don't know much for left team since I don't use Wanda or Winkle. Seems like Nautila works well, but good luck with energy

Having both if you are considering pandia and nautila. Pandia has a 2 cost and a 3 cost, whereas Nautila has only a 1 cost/3cost (ready1 after levelling her I think). I haven't upped both to max yet but nautila also has retaliate bonus on attacks I believe while pandia gets it on her defense
from my experience, pandia, nautila, alva and sanga makes a pretty balanced team
you can 1 hit ko enemies within a certain threshold throwing all 4 posse
and for longer bosses, the rotation is pretty simple: alva sanga poss for tanking big single hits, saving pandia nautila posse for multiple smaller hits
nautila e2 also helps a lot, with suddicient turns you can then throw pandias wax hot desire for better tankiness
Naut is way better than Pandia
